title: Napoleon Total War Memory Signatures Schema
description: Database schema for storing AOB patterns, pointer chains, and scan guides.

game.description: The name of the target game.

version.description: The game version or build this table is compatible with.

platform.description: List of supported platforms (e.g., windows, linux).

created.description: The date the table was created.

description.description: A description of the cheat table.

verified.description: Whether the table has been verified.

pointer_chains.description: A dictionary of pointer chains mapped by their unique names.

base_offset.description: The initial offset from the module base address.

offsets.description: A list of offsets forming the pointer chain.

type.description: The data type stored at the final address.

description.description: A brief description of what this chain points to.

notes.description: Any special notes regarding this chain.

aob_patterns.description: A dictionary of Array of Bytes patterns for signature scanning.

pattern.description: The hex string representing the AOB pattern, with wildcards ?? or XX.

description.description: A description of the target instruction.

offset_from_match.description: The offset from the start of the matched pattern to the actual instruction to patch.

nop_bytes.description: The number of bytes to NOP out when patching.

cheat_action.description: A description of what the cheat does (e.g., 'NOP the write').

scan_guides.description: Validation steps to guide users on finding values in-game.

steps.description: An ordered list of steps to follow.
